title: Optimize a Chatbot Response for a Booking Process
scenario: A customer is inquiring about booking a hotel room. The chatbot response should be concise, informative, and provide clear instructions on how to proceed with the booking process. The response should be under 80 characters, written in a friendly tone, and include a clear next step.
constraints: Should provide clear instructions on how to proceed with the booking process

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the given constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the chatbot response, ensuring it is friendly and informative.
Check if the chatbot response is under 80 characters.
Verify that the response includes a clear next step.
